dependencyHandoff.notesOnBlockers: verification is blocked until the import contract covers limits, duplicates, billing, and audit consistency

items.item: Add CSV bulk invite import for admins
items.expectedSpecDelta: define import semantics before widening current truth

backlog.capabilityGap: admins can invite one user at a time but cannot safely import invite batches
backlog.evidence: sales onboarding asks for spreadsheet-scale invites
backlog.unknowns: duplicate-email policy, seat enforcement, audit fan-out
backlog.nextDecision: reroute to full design before more execution work
backlog.whyNow: demand is real, but the contract is too wide to keep improvising in code
backlog.successSignal: the capability has a trusted import contract before implementation resumes
backlog.entryConstraints: must freeze limits, duplicates, warnings, and audit behavior first
backlog.openRisks: another partial implementation pass would deepen the semantic drift
backlog.firstPlanningQuestion: which subflows share one import contract and which need explicit splits?
backlog.requiredContextToLoad: invite limits, billing rules, duplicate handling, audit logging
backlog.whyReadyNow: the blocker is design truth, not implementation effort
